title: Design Real-Time Health Metrics
description: Design health metrics such as 'Connection Churn' and 'Active Subscriptions' for real-time systems. Monitor 'Message Delivery Latency' and other key indicators to detect system degradation proactively.
objectives: Design health metrics such as 'Connection Churn' and 'Active Subscriptions' for real-time systems.
Monitor 'Message Delivery Latency' and other key indicators to detect system degradation proactively.
